item.title: Mitie shares soar as takeover agreed
item.summary: Mitie has agreed a recommended cash takeover by facilities services rival OCS, valuing the group at approximately £3.1bn, in a deal that would combine two UK-headquartered businesses with revenues of around £8.5bn. Under the terms, Mitie shareholders will receive 218.5p per share in cash, plus a final dividend of up to 3.1p which they can […] The post Mitie shares soar as takeover agreed appeared first on UK Investor Magazine .
